Travel, Refined.

Two decades of orchestrating seamless corporate travel, exclusive conferences, and bespoke luxury experiences, so you never have to compromise.

Start a Conversation Explore Services

Who We Are

Quietly Exceptional

ProLuxe Travel is a London-based corporate and luxury travel management company. For nearly two decades, we have delivered end-to-end travel solutions for businesses that refuse to settle.

From large-scale conference logistics and group accommodation to intimate executive retreats and concierge services, we handle every detail — venues, ground transport, on-site coordination — so your team can focus on what matters.

Work with us →

What We Do

Our Services

Every engagement is built from scratch — never templated, always tailored.

Conference Logistics

Venue sourcing, delegate accommodation, ground transport, AV coordination, and on-site management for conferences of any scale.

Corporate Travel

End-to-end travel management for executives and teams — accommodation, itineraries, transfers, and 24/7 on-trip support.

Luxury Concierge

Private dining, exclusive experiences, VIP access, and bespoke arrangements — curated to the finest detail for discerning clients.

Group Accommodation

Negotiated rates, room block management, dietary and accessibility coordination for groups from ten to ten thousand.

Retreats & Away Days

Destination scouting, itinerary design, team-building logistics, and full on-ground management for corporate retreats.

Venue Sourcing

Access to a curated network of venues worldwide — boardrooms to ballrooms, country estates to city rooftops.

Why ProLuxe

Our Approach

Precision

Every detail is anticipated, confirmed, and double-checked. We don't leave room for surprises — unless they're the good kind.

Discretion

Your business is your business. We operate behind the scenes, ensuring seamless delivery without unnecessary noise.

Partnership

We don't just take briefs — we become an extension of your team, understanding your culture, standards, and expectations.

Experience

Nearly twenty years in corporate and luxury travel means we've seen it all — and built the relationships to handle anything.
